name: Treasure Hill Golf & Country Club
notes: LOCATION MISMATCH: Treasure Hill Golf & Country Club is NOT in Hua Hin — it is located in Ban Bueng, Chon Buri Province (eastern Thailand), approximately 60 km from Pattaya and ~2 hours from Bangkok. Address: 222 Moo 7, Klong Kiew, Ban Bueng, Chonburi 20220. GPS: 13.146369, 101.191247. Designer Yoshikazu Kato, opened 1994. It was listed in the pipeline as a Hua Hin course (#9) — this appears to be an error. There is no confirmed 'Treasure Hill Golf' course in the Hua Hin / Prachuap Khiri Khan region based on multiple search queries. Green fees per golfdd.com (March 2025): weekday 1,000 THB, weekend 1,500 THB. Caddie fee 380 THB / 18 holes. Cart fee 700 THB weekday, 400 THB for 9 holes. Course is 7,364 yards, set on rolling hill terrain at the base of an isolated mountain in tropical forest. Signature hole: 16th with a concrete crocodile in the pond. Popular for value play. Cart fee of 700 THB is weekday rate.
